meusDados.title: My Data — Data Subject Portal
meusDados.description: Exercise your rights under the Brazilian General Data Protection Law (Law No. 13.709/2018). All requests are recorded with a response deadline of up to 15 days.
meusDados.sessionHint: Your requests are linked to an anonymous session identifier. Save the request number for tracking purposes.
meusDados.rightsDescription: Under Arts. 9 and 18 of the LGPD, you have the following rights over your personal data:

access.title: Confirmation and Access
access.description: Confirm the existence of processing and access the personal data we hold about you.

rectify.title: Data Rectification
rectify.description: Request the correction of incomplete, inaccurate or outdated data.

anonymize.title: Anonymization, Blocking or Deletion
anonymize.description: Request anonymization, blocking or deletion of unnecessary, excessive or unlawfully processed data.

portability.title: Data Portability
portability.description: Receive your data in structured, interoperable format (JSON/CSV) for transfer to another provider.

delete.title: Data Erasure
delete.description: Request erasure of personal data processed based on your consent.

consent.title: Consent Withdrawal
consent.description: Withdraw previously given consent to the processing of personal data.

oppose.title: Objection to Processing
oppose.description: Object to processing carried out on legal bases other than consent.

meusDados.submitError: Unable to register the request. Please try again.
meusDados.noRequests: No requests registered in this session.
meusDados.legalNotice: This portal registers requests under Arts. 9 and 18 of the LGPD. The legal response deadline is up to 15 calendar days. The DPO is automatically notified for each request.
meusDados.dpoContact: For direct contact with the Data Protection Officer (DPO), use the official channels published on the institutional service page.
